title: Policy Bundle Manifest
description: Envelope describing a signed policy bundle tarball. The Rego sources, compiled WASM, and data documents live alongside this manifest in the tarball.

version.description: Bundle semantic version. Each promotion = patch bump; rule additions = minor; outcome changes = major.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 of the bundle tarball contents (excluding the signature file).

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 over canonicalJson({bundleId, version, contentHash}) using the customer's bundle-signing key.

compatibleSchemaVersions.description: Map of contract name → required schema version. Enforced at bundle load.
